text:
In the first scene, gazing into a glass meeting room, I am struck by a sense of separation—an observer in the corridor of collective purpose. The room glows with purposeful activity, people collaborating in thoughtfully curated space, while I remain apart, reflective, reminded of both the intimacy and distance embedded in modern intellectual life.

In the second scene, the atmosphere shifts. Surrounded by exhibits championing research and development, I am filled with anticipation and curiosity. The lively colors and open text ignite my sense of wonder. Here, contemplation and invention intersect—an invitation to imagine, to tinker, to become part of a story not yet finished. I feel the subtle thrill of possibility, mingling with the humility of being one among countless seekers.
